name_en: 《 packaging》💖 M's most special style this year, the Biker Bag, features new vintage soft-touch lambskin. Classic retro charm, soft leather, full leather lining, multi-pocket design blurs the line between function and decoration. Distinctive personality, versatile, sweet or edgy, large capacity. Almost every celebrity and fashion blogger has one, as popular as the previous MiuWander.
